ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store where the sales were recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data entry */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the week */,
  "holiday_flag" INTEGER /* Indicates if the week includes a holiday (1: Yes, 0: No) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the week */,
  "fuel_price" REAL /* Average fuel price during the week */,
  "cpi" REAL /* Consumer price index for the week */,
  "unemployment" REAL /* Unemployment rate during the week */,
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the promotion affecting sales */,
  "customer_traffic" INTEGER /* Number of customers visiting the store during the week */,
  "online_sales" REAL /* Total online sales for the week */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Average inventory level during the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the store */,
  "store_size" REAL /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the store was opened */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the geographical region of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager's tenure ended (nullable for current managers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_calendar" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., CPI, Unemployment) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
